title: Summary of the steps to apply for a visa :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Summary of the steps to apply for a visa
An overview of the steps to choosing a New Zealand visa, preparing an application and visa processing. Use the online tool to compare visa options and requirements to help you decide which visa to apply for.

## Steps to apply for a visa
- 1 Step 1: Decide which visa to apply for Visa options include those that allow you to work, study, visit, bring or join family, stay longer or live permanently in New Zealand. Find and choose a visa

### Step 1: Decide which visa to apply for
Visa options include those that allow you to work, study, visit, bring or join family, stay longer or live permanently in New Zealand.
Find and choose a visa
- 2 Step 2: Check the visa requirements Check the visa information for the specific visa you want to apply for. You may need to meet specific requirements for your: health character and identity financial situation skills and qualifications length of time you have lived in New Zealand. We will ask you to provide proof that you meet the visa's requirements in your application. Some visas require you to first submit an expression of interest (EOI) before you apply for a visa.

### Step 2: Check the visa requirements
Check the visa information for the specific visa you want to apply for.
You may need to meet specific requirements for your:
- character and identity
- skills and qualifications
- length of time you have lived in New Zealand.
We will ask you to provide proof that you meet the visa's requirements in your application.
Some visas require you to first submit an expression of interest (EOI) before you apply for a visa.
- 3 Step 3: Prepare your documents Allow enough time for you to get any official documents we ask for, and to get them translated into English if they are not already. Translating supporting documents into English

### Step 3: Prepare your documents
Allow enough time for you to get any official documents we ask for, and to get them translated into English if they are not already.
Translating supporting documents into English
- 4 Step 4: Apply online or on paper You must pay all visa fees. The application process depends on the type of visa you apply for and if you are applying online or on paper. For some visa types, you can only apply online. Process for applying online You can search for and download paper application forms available in a PDF format. Application forms, guides and checklists

### Step 4: Apply online or on paper
You must pay all visa fees.
The application process depends on the type of visa you apply for and if you are applying online or on paper. For some visa types, you can only apply online.
Process for applying online
You can search for and download paper application forms available in a PDF format.
Application forms, guides and checklists
- 5 Step 5: Wait for our decision How long you wait for a decision about your visa depends on a number of factors, including: which visa you applied for where you apply from how many other visa applications we have received. Waiting for a visa Note We receive high numbers of applications between November and March. This means it may take us longer to process your visa application during this time.

### Step 5: Wait for our decision
How long you wait for a decision about your visa depends on a number of factors, including:
- which visa you applied for
- where you apply from
- how many other visa applications we have received.
We receive high numbers of applications between November and March. This means it may take us longer to process your visa application during this time.
